short_description: Approved: Keynote session logistics change - Maplewood Leadership Conference
session: Keynote presentation by Mary Vasquez, Principal Ridgewood Collegiate

approved_slot.consolidation_note: preceding panel discussion folded into the speaker's presentation slot

reason_for_change: Cordell Hall electrical service work was extended by the facilities contractor beyond the original completion window. Theatre B is the closest venue with the audio visual capability the session requires.
signage_updates: signage at Cordell Hall entrance will redirect attendees to Theatre B
water and coffee service moved to the Theatre B foyer
session sign in sheets have been reprinted with the new venue and time
recording_notes: Theatre B has a fixed camera position that the recording team confirmed covers the stage lectern and the projection screen. The recording will be uploaded to the conference video host within seven business days of the session end. The speaker retains editorial approval before the file is published to any wider audience.
